source_pr.title: topsql: fix data race in test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs520 <crazycs520@gmail.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #33613

Problem Summary: Avoid data race.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: topsql: fix data race in test
failure_signature: topsql: fix data race in test
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a data race in TopSQL labeling for DDL jobs: `jobContext` cached fields (SQL/digest/context) could be reused and updated in a racy way across job execution. This PR stabilizes it by resetting the jobContext when a job finishes and adjusting how SQL info is attached to avoid write races.
fix_pattern: Reset `jobContext` after each DDL job and adjust TopSQL SQLInfo attachment to avoid concurrent write races.

evidence: evidence: topsql: fix data race in test
